prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: HWC-AFL3X5SMBCPB-STD-BLCK-AMZ-HPN Product Type: FILE_FOLDER Brand (from catalog): HWC Existing Title: HWC LEATHER POCKET 3X5 MEMO BOOK COVER NOTE PAD HOLDER - PLAIN Description: Size:One Pack | Color:Black
* COLOR: BLACK * MATERIAL: LEATHER * MEMO BOOK SIZE: 3.5" x 5.5" * BOOK COVER ONLY - PAPER NOT INCLUDED * PERFECT SIZE. Search Terms: note pad small pocket leather case handheld genuine black Features: - COLOR: BLACK - MATERIAL: LEATHER - MEMO BOOK SIZE: 3.5 - BOOK COVER ONLY - PAPER NOT INCLUDED - PERFECT SIZE! === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: HWC 3x5 Black Leather Pocket Memo Book Cover

anthropic.title_differentiation: Genuine Leather, 35 X 55 Inch, Handheld Note Pad Holder, Plain Design, Cover Only
